name: Soroswap Router
description: Soroswap AMM/DEX router, ALREADY DEPLOYED on Stellar testnet. Connect to it — do NOT deploy it. Use for: token swaps, exchanges, 'swap X for Y', best-price routing, simple DEX UIs. Swaps token-for-token through liquidity pools. The XLM <-> USDC pool has liquidity.
useFor: swaps, DEX, exchange, trading tokens, AMM, XLM/USDC

methods.name: router_get_amounts_out
methods.description: QUOTE (read-only): expected output amounts for amount_in along path. path = Vec of token contract addresses [tokenIn, tokenOut]. Read the LAST element as the expected output. Use this to show the quote before swapping.

methods.name: swap_exact_tokens_for_tokens
methods.description: Swap an exact amount_in for as much output as possible. amount_out_min = quote * (1 - slippage); use 5% slippage. path = [tokenIn, tokenOut]. to = recipient address. deadline = a unix timestamp (seconds) a few minutes in the future. Signed by the connected wallet.
